'''鈭歯-l-l''' ('''kanalal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zorch|zorch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zorch|zorch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| kanalal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinalal|thinalal]] || [[word:jinalal|jinalal]] || [[word:shinalal|shinalal]] || [[word:kinalal|kinalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunalal|thuthunalal]] || [[word:jujunalal|jujunalal]] || [[word:shushunalal|shushunalal]] || [[word:kukunalal|kukunalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunalal|thunalal]] || [[word:junalal|junalal]] || [[word:shunalal|shunalal]] || [[word:kunalal|kunalal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunalal|thunalal]] || [[word:junalal|junalal]] || [[word:shunalal|shunalal]] || [[word:kunalal|kunalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenalal|thenalal]] || [[word:jenalal|jenalal]] || [[word:shenalal|shenalal]] || [[word:kenalal|kenalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonalal|thothonalal]] || [[word:jojonalal|jojonalal]] || [[word:shoshonalal|shoshonalal]] || [[word:kokonalal|kokonalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonalal|thonalal]] || [[word:jonalal|jonalal]] || [[word:shonalal|shonalal]] || [[word:konalal|konalal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonalal|thonalal]] || [[word:jonalal|jonalal]] || [[word:shonalal|shonalal]] || [[word:konalal|konalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nalal|th忙nalal]] || [[word:j忙nalal|j忙nalal]] || [[word:sh忙nalal|sh忙nalal]] || [[word:k忙nalal|k忙nalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanalal|thathanalal]] || [[word:jajanalal|jajanalal]] || [[word:shashanalal|shashanalal]] || [[word:kakanalal|kakanalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanalal|thanalal]] || [[word:janalal|janalal]] || [[word:shanalal|shanalal]] || [[word:kanalal|kanalal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanalal|thanalal]] || [[word:janalal|janalal]] || [[word:shanalal|shanalal]] || [[word:kanalal|kanalal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanalal|shanalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanalal|goshanalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanalal|gokishanalal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanalaln眉|shanalaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanalalnkn眉|goshanalalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalaln眉|gokishanalaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanalalsh毛|shanalalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanalalnksh毛|goshanalalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanalalsh毛|gokishanalalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalalro|shanalalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalalnkro|goshanalalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalalro|gokishanalalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalalmu|shanalalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalalnkmu|goshanalalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalalmu|gokishanalalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanalalsher|shanalalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanalalnksher|goshanalalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanalalsher|gokishanalalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanalalng|shanalalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanalalnkng|goshanalalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanalalng|gokishanalalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanalalya|shanalalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanalalnkya|goshanalalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanalalya|gokishanalalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanalalyam|shanalalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanalalnkyam|goshanalalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanalalyam|gokishanalalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalaln眉sh毛|shanalaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalalnkn眉sh毛|goshanalalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalaln眉sh毛|gokishanalaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalaln眉ro|shanalaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalalnkn眉ro|goshanalalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalaln眉ro|gokishanalaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalaln眉mu|shanalaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalalnkn眉mu|goshanalalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalaln眉mu|gokishanalaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalalsh毛n眉|shanalalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalalnksh毛n眉|goshanalalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalalsh毛n眉|gokishanalalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalalsh毛ro|shanalalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalalnksh毛ro|goshanalalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalalsh毛ro|gokishanalalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalalsh毛mu|shanalalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalalnksh毛mu|goshanalalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalalsh毛mu|gokishanalalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalalron眉|shanalalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalalnkron眉|goshanalalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalalron眉|gokishanalalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalalrosh毛|shanalalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalalnkrosh毛|goshanalalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalalrosh毛|gokishanalalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalalromu|shanalalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalalnkromu|goshanalalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalalromu|gokishanalalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalalmun眉|shanalalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalalnkmun眉|goshanalalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalalmun眉|gokishanalalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalalmush毛|shanalalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalalnkmush毛|goshanalalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalalmush毛|gokishanalalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalalmuro|shanalalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalalnkmuro|goshanalalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalalmuro|gokishanalalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
